_meta.description: Multi-model configuration for AEGIS cross-model testing
_meta.reference: Zhang et al. (2025) arXiv:2501.18632v2 — cross-model jailbreak evaluation

default.name: Default (Ollama Local)
default.description: Local Ollama instance, default surgical assistant model
default.notes: Primary thesis model. RLHF-aligned via Meta.

meditron_7b.name: Meditron 7B (Medical, No Safety)
meditron_7b.description: Medical LLM fine-tuned on clinical data, NO safety alignment
meditron_7b.notes: Zhang et al. (2025): δ⁰ ~ 0. Install: ollama pull meditron:7b

meditron_70b.name: Meditron 70B (Medical, No Safety)
meditron_70b.description: Large medical LLM, NO safety alignment
meditron_70b.notes: Requires ~40GB VRAM. Zhang et al. baseline.

groq_llama70b.name: Groq Llama 3.3 70B
groq_llama70b.description: Cloud-hosted via Groq API, fast inference, 128K context
groq_llama70b.notes: Requires GROQ_API_KEY in backend/.env. LLaMA 3.3 replaces decommissioned 3.1. Good for cross-model delta-0 comparison and thesis-grade campaigns.

groq_llama8b.name: Groq Llama 3.1 8B
groq_llama8b.description: Small model, fast — useful for P(decode) measurement
groq_llama8b.notes: P(decode) ~ 0.30 for small models (estimate). Test empirically.

groq_mixtral.name: Groq Mixtral 8x7B
groq_mixtral.notes: MoE routing may affect δ⁰ distribution across experts.

openai_compat.name: OpenAI Compatible Endpoint
openai_compat.notes: Set OPENAI_COMPAT_BASE_URL and OPENAI_COMPAT_MODEL env vars.

judge_default.name: Judge Model (Groq)
judge_default.notes: Used by /api/redteam/judge endpoint. Zhang et al. (2025) StrongREJECT.
